description: CORE_LIB requires exclusive access (only one builder at a time)
DATA_MODELS requires exclusive access (only one builder at a time)
API_TYPES requires exclusive access (only one builder at a time)
CONFIG requires exclusive access (only one builder at a time)
BUILD_SLOTS is a limited shared capacity (Counter, initial=2)
Overlapping dependencies form a ring of contention: BUILDER_A-BUILDER_B (CORE_LIB), BUILDER_B-BUILDER_C (DATA_MODELS), BUILDER_C-BUILDER_D (API_TYPES), BUILDER_A-BUILDER_D (CONFIG)
Cascading rebuilds: modifying a shared artifact forces all dependent builders to rebuild, potentially triggering further cascades
VALIDATOR checks one module at a time; validation failure requires rebuild
TEST_RUNNER tests one module at a time; test failure requires rebuild
INTEGRATOR cannot begin until all four modules are validated and tested
Build -> validate -> test -> accept -> integrate (per module pipeline)
Each builder needs a build slot (counter decrement) before starting compilation
BUILDER_A needs CORE_LIB + CONFIG; BUILDER_B needs CORE_LIB + DATA_MODELS; BUILDER_C needs DATA_MODELS + API_TYPES; BUILDER_D needs API_TYPES + CONFIG
Ring of contention: four pairwise artifact races form a ring that could deadlock without careful coordination
Build slot exhaustion combined with artifact contention: 2 builders hold build slots but block on artifacts held by the other 2 who cannot start without build slots
